html:
2026-0285
2026-03-30GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityArrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the Moonlight ProgrammeOrder authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Arrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the Moonlight Programme.N/A
subject: Arrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the Moonlight Programme
precis: Order authorizing the Prime Minister, the Minister of Foreign Affairs, or a delegate, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Arrangement between the Government of Canada and the European Space Agency concerning the Participation by the Government of Canada in the Moonlight Programme.
